summary: Field View Dialog TOUCHDOWN and SAFETY feature testing completed successfully. All end zone scenarios work correctly - TOUCHDOWN UI appears when slider reaches opponent's end zone, SAFETY UI appears when slider reaches own end zone. Both buttons function correctly and set the appropriate result and yards values.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing DialogDescription - 'Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding DialogDescription to FieldViewDialog to fix accessibility warning
seed_data_creation: Used existing OHIO vs NC STATE game for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Field View Dialog TOUCHDOWN and SAFETY features are fully functional. For NC STATE (away team): position 0 = TOUCHDOWN (opponent's end zone), position 100 = SAFETY (own end zone). For home team: position 100 = TOUCHDOWN, position 0 = SAFETY. The TOUCHDOWN button sets selectedResult to 'touchdown' and yards to max distance. The SAFETY button sets selectedResult to 'safety' and yards to negative loss distance.

touchdown_ui_display.description: TOUCHDOWN UI with trophy icons, 'TD' text, and yellow/gold styling appears when slider reaches opponent's end zone

safety_ui_display.description: SAFETY UI with shield icons, '2 PTS' text, and red styling appears when slider reaches own end zone

touchdown_button_appears.description: Yellow/gold TOUCHDOWN! button replaces normal 'Set X Yards' button when in touchdown position

safety_button_appears.description: Red SAFETY (2 PTS) button replaces normal 'Set X Yards' button when in safety position

touchdown_button_click.description: Clicking TOUCHDOWN button sets selectedResult to 'touchdown', sets yards to max distance (75 from NC 25), and closes dialog

safety_button_click.description: Clicking SAFETY button sets selectedResult to 'safety', sets yards to negative loss (-25 from NC 25), and closes dialog

normal_yardage_calculation.description: Normal yardage display (+30 yards, GAIN) works correctly when slider is not in end zone

field_visualization.description: Miniature football field shows start position (yellow), end position (green/red), and trail between them

slider_functionality.description: Slider and quick adjust buttons (-10, -5, -1, +1, +5, +10) work correctly to move end position

position_labels.description: Start and End position labels update correctly (e.g., 'NC 25' to 'GOAL LINE')

test_flow: 3. Click on OHIO vs NC STATE live game (NC STATE has possession at NC 25)
4. Click RUN → Select player #56 → Click GAIN
5. Click Field View button to open dialog
6. Test TOUCHDOWN: Click -10 button 10 times to reach position 0 (OHIO's end zone)
7. Verify TOUCHDOWN UI appears with trophy icons, 'TD' text, yellow styling
9. Click TOUCHDOWN! button → Verify dialog closes, result set to 'touchdown', yards set to 75
11. Test SAFETY: Click +10 button 10 times to reach position 100 (NC STATE's own end zone)
12. Verify SAFETY UI appears with shield icons, '2 PTS' text, red styling
14. Click SAFETY button → Verify dialog closes, result set to 'safety', yards set to -25
15. Test normal yardage: Click -10 button 3 times for 30 yard gain
16. Verify normal yards display (+30, GAIN) and 'SET 30 YARDS GAIN' button
